title: Resolution Adopting the Enhanced Local Climate Change Action Plan ( E-LCCAP) of Los Baños: a Convergence of Mitigation and Adaptation for the Period 2021-2031 in Accordance with Republic Act 9729 Otherwise Known As the Climate Change Act of 2009. (AUTHOR :COUNCILOR MARLO PJ A. ALIPON, REE, RMP,MPA, 04/27/22)
